features.description: Verify mission artifacts are valid and complete. Check that mission.md, validation-contract.md, features.json, and AGENTS.md exist and are well-formed. Report any missing or malformed artifacts.
expectedBehavior: features.json contains valid non-empty features array
Validation contract has at least one assertion per area
verificationSteps: Check file existence for mission.md, validation-contract.md, features.json, AGENTS.md

features.description: Execute one bounded real check in-repo through the mission runner. Verify current branch name matches expected (dgdh/trio-only-harness-snapshot-20260328), verify git status is clean, verify .factory/droids contains only nerah.md, eidan.md, taren.md. This proves the runner actually executes real work.
expectedBehavior: Git status shows truth (clean or known state)
Droids directory contains exactly the trio files

features.description: Taren reviews the entire mission execution and provides explicit verdict. Report: 1) what was proven, 2) what failed, 3) whether Mission Control is trustworthy enough for a larger cleanup mission now, 4) exact blocker if not. This must be an honest assessment based on actual evidence.
expectedBehavior: Clear go/no-go recommendation for larger missions
verificationSteps: Check git status for any uncommitted changes
